subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-22
subcodes.first_line: If entertainments were of an intellectual character such as lectures or singing and music, they were approved, but a Bazaar was not so commendable
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @business; financial; property matters, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
